question: The bar chart shows the cost from 2018 to 2022. Which statement is best supported by the chart?

options.A: The cost in 2022 was the highest among all the years shown.
options.B: The cost in 2018 and 2021 was the same.
options.C: The chart does not allow comparison of the highest cost years because they exceed the visible range.
options.D: The cost decreased every year from 2018 to 2022.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
